svg.title: Flag of Qatar (カタール)
svg.desc: ISO 3166-1: QA | Ratio: 11:28 | De jure (Flag Law No. 14 of 2012) | Maroon: Pantone 1955 C (#8A1538)

rdf:Description.dc:title: Flag of Qatar (カタール)
rdf:Description.dc:creator: 国旗仕様検証プロジェクト (Flag Specification Verification Project)
rdf:Description.dc:rights: Colors verified from Flag Law No. 14 of 2012. Ratio 11:28 per official specification. SVG geometry reconstructed to match legal ratio.
